events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a damper positions vs. balance report mismatch in an HVAC-R terminations & balancing scope. Work is rough-complete. This is a non-compliant condition - damper positions don't match the TAB (Testing, Adjusting, Balancing) report, meaning the system isn't properly balanced. This is a fail because it's non-compliant with the balance report.

Let me construct the JSON response.

  ],

    "Re-verify all damper positions against the approved TAB report and re-set to specified values.",

  ],
  "rationale": "At rough-complete stage, damper positions must align with the TAB report. A mismatch means the balancing work is not in compliance with engineered specifications and SMACNA/TAB requirements, so the work fails until corrected and re-verified.",
